description: Comprehensive evidence assessment figure: PANTHER tree, domain architecture, sequence identity, and evidence summary for LPL1 MAG lipase hypothesis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 14))
fig.suptitle('Evidence Assessment: LPL1 (Q5AMS2) Monoacylglycerol Lipase Activity (GO:0047372)', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Panel 1: PANTHER family tree schematic
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.set_title('A. PANTHER Family Tree (PTHR12482)\nDUF676 Alpha/Beta Hydrolase', fontweight='bold')
ax1.axis('off')

# Draw simplified tree
# Root duplication
ax1.plot([5, 5], [9, 8], 'k-', lw=2)
ax1.plot([5, 2.5], [8, 7], 'k-', lw=2)
ax1.plot([5, 7.5], [8, 7], 'k-', lw=2)

# SF62 branch (ROG1) - left
ax1.plot([2.5, 2.5], [7, 5], 'k-', lw=2)
ax1.plot([2.5, 1.5], [5, 4], 'k-', lw=2)  # ROG1

# SF65/SF24 branch - duplication
ax1.plot([2.5, 4], [5, 4], 'k-', lw=2)  # SF65 then SF24
ax1.plot([4, 4], [4, 3], 'k-', lw=2)
ax1.plot([4, 3], [3, 2], 'k-', lw=2)  # SF24 - LPL1
ax1.plot([4, 5.5], [3, 2], 'k-', lw=2)  # SF65

# SF5 branch - right
ax1.plot([7.5, 7.5], [7, 4], 'k-', lw=2)

# Labels and nodes
ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((5, 9), 0.25, color='orange', zorder=5))
ax1.text(5, 9.5, 'Root', ha='center', fontsize=8)
ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((5, 8), 0.2, color='red', zorder=5))
ax1.text(5.4, 8.2, 'DUPLICATION', fontsize=7, color='red', fontstyle='italic')

ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((2.5, 5), 0.2, color='red', zorder=5))
ax1.text(2.9, 5.2, 'DUP', fontsize=7, color='red', fontstyle='italic')

ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((4, 3), 0.2, color='red', zorder=5))
ax1.text(4.4, 3.2, 'DUP', fontsize=7, color='red', fontstyle='italic')

# Leaf labels
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.3, 3.5), 2, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                       facecolor='#ff9999', edgecolor='black', lw=1.5))
ax1.text(1.3, 3.9, 'SF62: ROG1\nMAG lipase (IDA)', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')

ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((1.8, 1.3), 2.4, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                       facecolor='#99ccff', edgecolor='black', lw=1.5))
ax1.text(3, 1.7, 'SF24: Sc_LPL1/Ca_LPL1\nPhospholipase B (IDA)', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')

ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((4.8, 1.3), 2, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                       facecolor='#dddddd', edgecolor='black'))
ax1.text(5.8, 1.7, 'SF65: Esterase\n(putative)', fontsize=8, ha='center')

ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((6.5, 3.5), 2, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                       facecolor='#dddddd', edgecolor='black'))
ax1.text(7.5, 3.9, 'SF5: Other\nlipases', fontsize=8, ha='center')

# Arrow showing annotation propagation
ax1.annotate('IBA propagation\n(across 2 duplications!)', 
             xy=(2.5, 3.5), xytext=(1, 2.3),
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5),
             fontsize=8, color='red', ha='center')
ax1.annotate('', xy=(3, 2.1), xytext=(1, 2.3),
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5, ls='--'))

# Panel 2: Domain architecture comparison
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 750)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 5.5)
ax2.set_title('B. Domain Architecture Comparison', fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue position')
ax2.set_yticks([0, 1, 2, 3, 4])
ax2.set_yticklabels(['MGL2\n(Q03649)', 'YJU3\n(P28321)', 'ROG1\n(P53118)', 
                      'Sc_LPL1\n(Q08448)', 'Ca_LPL1\n(Q5AMS2)'], fontsize=9)

# Draw protein bars
proteins = [
    ('MGL2', 449, [(1, 449, '#bbbbbb', 'Abhydro_1')], [(230, 'GFSLG')], 'PTHR10794'),
    ('YJU3', 313, [(1, 313, '#aaddaa', 'Hydrolase_4')], [(121, 'GHSMG')], 'PTHR11614'),
    ('ROG1', 685, [(234, 434, '#ff9999', 'DUF676')], [(267, 'GHSLG')], 'PTHR12482:SF62'),
    ('Sc_LPL1', 450, [(1, 200, '#99ccff', 'DUF676')], [(88, 'GYSQG')], 'PTHR12482:SF24'),
    ('Ca_LPL1', 556, [(14, 213, '#6699ff', 'DUF676')], [(102, 'GYSLG')], 'PTHR12482:SF24'),
]

for i, (name, length, domains, motifs, panther) in enumerate(proteins):
    # Background bar
    ax2.barh(i, length, height=0.4, color='#eeeeee', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=0.5)
    # Domain
    for dstart, dend, color, dlabel in domains:
        ax2.barh(i, dend-dstart, left=dstart, height=0.4, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        ax2.text((dstart+dend)/2, i, dlabel, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
    # GXSXG motif
    for mpos, mlabel in motifs:
        ax2.plot(mpos, i+0.3, 'v', color='red', markersize=6)
        ax2.text(mpos, i+0.42, mlabel, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=6, color='red')
    # Length label
    ax2.text(length+5, i, f'{length}aa', va='center', fontsize=7)
    # PANTHER
    ax2.text(700, i, panther, va='center', fontsize=6, color='gray')

# TM regions
ax2.barh(4, 20, left=286, height=0.4, color='yellow', edgecolor='orange', linewidth=1)
ax2.barh(3, 20, left=269, height=0.4, color='yellow', edgecolor='orange', linewidth=1)

# Legend
ax2.text(350, 5.2, 'TM', fontsize=7, color='orange', fontweight='bold')
ax2.plot([340], [5.2], 's', color='yellow', markersize=6, markeredgecolor='orange')

# Panel 3: Sequence identity heatmap
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.set_title('C. DUF676 Domain Sequence Identity (%)', fontweight='bold')

# Identity matrix (from our analysis)
labels = ['Ca_LPL1', 'Sc_LPL1', 'Sc_ROG1']
identity_matrix = np.array([
    [100, 44.4, 25.6],
    [44.4, 100, 25.0],  # estimated
    [25.6, 25.0, 100]
])

im = ax3.imshow(identity_matrix, cmap='YlOrRd', vmin=20, vmax=100, aspect='auto')
ax3.set_xticks(range(3))
ax3.set_yticks(range(3))
ax3.set_xticklabels(labels, fontsize=10)
ax3.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=10)

for i in range(3):
    for j in range(3):
        color = 'white' if identity_matrix[i,j] > 60 else 'black'
        ax3.text(j, i, f'{identity_matrix[i,j]:.1f}%', ha='center', va='center', 
                fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color=color)

plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax3, label='Sequence identity (%)')

# Panel 4: Evidence summary table
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Evidence Summary', fontweight='bold')

table_data = [
    ['Evidence', 'Finding', 'Impact'],
    ['Closest ortholog\n(Sc_LPL1)', 'Phospholipase B\n(IDA, PMID:25014274)', 'AGAINST\nMAG lipase'],
    ['Same subfamily\n(PTHR12482:SF24)', 'Both in LD Phospho-\nlipase 1 subfamily', 'AGAINST\nMAG lipase'],
    ['MAG lipase source\n(Sc_ROG1)', 'Different subfamily\n(SF62, 25.6% identity)', 'WEAKENS\nIBA transfer'],
    ['2 duplication events\nbetween subfamilies', 'Functional divergence\nexpected after DUP', 'WEAKENS\nIBA transfer'],
    ['InterPro Rog1_fam\n(IPR016445)', 'Ca_LPL1 LACKS\nthis signature', 'AGAINST\nMAG lipase'],
    ['Ca_LPL1 direct\nevidence', 'NONE available\n(uncharacterized)', 'INCONCLUSIVE'],
]

colors = ['#cccccc', '#ffcccc', '#ffcccc', '#ffddaa', '#ffddaa', '#ffcccc', '#ffffcc']

table = ax4.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=[[c]*3 for c in colors])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.8)

# Style header row
for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#666666')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('evidence_assessment.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved as evidence_assessment.png")
